I have read the Reminders below

Q: What is Charisma Counter? A: After activate this function- the charisma value of on mic users will be counted within a period of time. Charisma value will zero cleared if you leave mic. 
 Q: How to calculate Charisma value? A: when you receive gift/frame/ring/etc. You Charisma value will be counted (1💎=1 Charisma Value). 
 Q: Who could activate and quit this function? A: The owner or admin of the party. 
 Q：What are the rules of the Charisma Ranking? A：Ranking according to the charisma value obtained within the specified time
